title: Frame Company Watson Range White 16x12 inch Picture Photo Frame *Choice of Sizes* Fitted with Real Glass
features: These picture and photo frames with mount are made in the UK by Frame Company
The frame moulding is made from foil wrapped MDF and measures 38 mm in width and 15 mm deep
Each frame is fitted with glass, MDF backing board and picture hanger, frames larger than 20 x 16 inches are fitted with plastic safety glass
The frame dimensions refer to the glass/picture size and not the overall size
description: From the manufacturer Frame Company specialises in offering a select range of quality ready-made picture and photo frames. With a wide selection of sizes, styles, materials and finishes to choose from our approach is a simple one; to offer our customers choice, value for money and excellent levels of customer service. Picture Frames Our ready-made picture and photo frames are made to order in our workshop. With a wide selection of styles, sizes and materials you are sure to find the perfect frame for you. Framed Mirrors Choosing from a wide variety of picture frame mouldings we are able to offer you quality hand-made framed mirrors in various styles and sizes. Framed Art Prints With an extensive library of prints to choose from we have carefully curated a selection of prints which perfectly complement our picture frames. Personalised Prints Designed by our in-house illustrators we are proud to present our selection of personalised framed prints. Especially designed for those special occasions, these are sure to make the perfect gift.
